title: salix phylicifolia var. glabra
intro: Salix phylicifolia var. glabra, also known as the smooth willow, is a variety of the gray willow plant, which is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree. The smooth willow has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its bark and leaves. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Smooth willow can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its bark can be dried and used as a salve or tincture, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional due to potential side effects.
